channel.title: Posts on Riclivo.online
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Riclivo.online

item.title: My First Post
item.description:
I checked comments on a viral video… something feels off

I was going through comments on a trending video and noticed something weird.

A lot of them looked almost identical. Same kind of wording, same tone.

Not saying they’re bots for sure… but it made me question how real comment sections actually are.

Has anyone else noticed this?
